title: scleranthus annuus var. biennis
intro: Scleranthus annuus var. biennis, also known as annual knawel or annual buttonweed, is a biennial herb belonging to the carnation family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Scleranthus annuus var. biennis has been found to have antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and sedative properties, which can help to alleviate menstrual cramps, anxiety, and insomnia. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and promoting relaxation, as well as acting as a natural remedy for menstrual disorders and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Scleranthus annuus var. biennis is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
